name: Tour Guide

dialogs.script:
say: Hello, {player}! Welcome to Pallet Town!
say: I'll show you around. Follow me!
movenpc: 15 8
moveplayer: 14 8
say: Over here is your Rival's house.
say: Your rival lives here — he's always one step ahead!
movenpc: 16 14
moveplayer: 15 14
say: And this is Professor Oak's Lab.
say: The Professor studies Pokemon from all over the world.
say: If you ever need advice, come here!
movenpc: 11 2
moveplayer: 11 3
say: Finally, up here is the exit to Route 1.
say: Head north when you're ready to start your adventure!
say: That's the full tour, {player}. Good luck out there!
movenpc: 8 8
setflag: tour_complete
lines: I'll show you around. Follow me!
Over here is your Rival's house.
Your rival lives here — he's always one step ahead!
And this is Professor Oak's Lab.
The Professor studies Pokemon from all over the world.
If you ever need advice, come here!
Finally, up here is the exit to Route 1.
Head north when you're ready to start your adventure!
That's the full tour, {player}. Good luck out there!

dialogs.script:
say: Hope the tour was helpful, {player}!
say: Remember — Route 1 is to the north, Oak's Lab is to the south-east!
lines: Remember — Route 1 is to the north, Oak's Lab is to the south-east!
